pass_orders.name: Dishes to verify
pass_orders.description: Dishes (orders) a visitor must serve correctly to pass. The check is satisfied the moment this many are served.

lives.name: Lives
lives.description: Mistakes allowed. Cooking a wrong or rotten ingredient, dropping one at the wrong station, trashing a needed one, or letting a needed one spoil each costs a life. Running out ends the round.

item_window_ticks.name: Time per ingredient
item_window_ticks.description: Ticks an ingredient waits on the prep counter before it spoils (50 ticks per second). Lower means tighter reaction pressure.

distractor_percent.name: Wrong or rotten chance
distractor_percent.description: Percent of ingredients that are wrong (not on the order) or rotten and must be trashed, not cooked.

recipe_size.name: Recipe size
recipe_size.description: Ingredients each order needs (the recipe length). More ingredients per dish makes each order take longer to serve.

time_budget_seconds.name: Round length
time_budget_seconds.description: Seconds before the round ends. Reaching the limit without serving enough dishes is a fail.

sound.name: Sound effects
sound.description: Play subtle sound effects (cook, mistake, verified). Visitors can always mute in-game.
